# GBP Post Templates

> Ready-to-use templates for Google Business Profile posts. Aim for 1-2 posts per week.

---

## Post Types Overview

| Type | Best For | CTA Options |
|------|----------|-------------|
| **What's New** | Updates, news, tips | Learn More, Call Now |
| **Offer** | Discounts, promotions | Get Offer, Call Now |
| **Event** | Workshops, open houses | Learn More, Sign Up |
| **Product** | New products, services | Order, Learn More |

---

## General Tips

### Post Best Practices
- **Length:** 150-300 words (1500 char max)
- **Photos:** Always include an image (1200x900px ideal)
- **Keywords:** Include naturally (service + location)
- **CTA:** Always use a call-to-action button
- **Frequency:** 1-2 posts per week minimum
- **Timing:** Posts expire after 7 days, re-post or refresh

### Formatting Tips
- Use emojis sparingly for visual breaks 👆
- Short paragraphs (2-3 sentences)
- Include a question when appropriate
- End with clear next step

---

## "What's New" Post Templates

### Template 1: Service Highlight
```
🔧 Did you know we offer [specific service]?

Whether you need [use case 1] or [use case 2], our experienced [City] team is here to help.

Here's what sets us apart:
✅ [Benefit 1]
✅ [Benefit 2]
✅ [Benefit 3]

[Service] starts at just $[price] and includes [what's included].

📞 Call us today or click below to schedule your appointment!

#[Industry]Services #[City]Business #[Service]
```

**CTA:** Call Now / Book Online / Learn More

---

### Template 2: Customer Success Story
```
Another happy customer! 🎉

[First name] came to us needing [problem/service]. Our team [what you did] and now [positive outcome].

"[Short quote from customer if available]" - [Customer name]

This is why we do what we do. Thank you for trusting [Business Name] with your [service type] needs!

Ready for your own success story? Let's talk!

#CustomerReview #[City][Industry] #HappyCustomers
```

**CTA:** Call Now / Read Reviews

---

### Template 3: Behind the Scenes
```
A day in the life at [Business Name]! 👷‍♂️

Here's our team working on [project type] in [neighborhood/area].

[1-2 sentences about what's happening in the photo]

We love serving our [City] community and take pride in every job - big or small.

Thinking about [service]? We'd love to help!

#BehindTheScenes #[City]Local #[Industry]Life
```

**CTA:** Call Now / Get Quote

---

### Template 4: Tip/Educational Content
```
💡 Pro Tip: [Topic]

[Common problem or question the audience has]?

Here's what you should know:

1️⃣ [Tip 1]
2️⃣ [Tip 2]
3️⃣ [Tip 3]

Of course, if you'd rather leave it to the pros, [Business Name] is here to help! We've been serving [City] for [X] years.

Questions? Drop us a call!

#ProTips #[Industry]Tips #[City]Experts
```

**CTA:** Learn More / Call Now

---

### Template 5: Team Spotlight
```
Meet [Name], our [Job Title]! 👋

[Name] has been with [Business Name] for [X] years and specializes in [specialty].

Fun fact: [Something personal/interesting about them]

When you call [Business Name], you're not just getting a service - you're getting a dedicated team that cares.

Thanks for being awesome, [Name]!

#MeetTheTeam #[City]Team #[Industry]Pros
```

**CTA:** Learn More / Call Now

---

### Template 6: Seasonal/Timely
```
☀️ Summer is here - is your [thing] ready?

[Problem that happens this time of year]. Don't let [bad outcome] catch you off guard!

Our [Season] [Service] Checklist:
✅ [Item 1]
✅ [Item 2]
✅ [Item 3]

Not sure where to start? [Business Name] offers [service] for only $[price].

📅 Spots fill up fast - book yours today!

#[Season]Ready #[City][Industry] #[Season]Maintenance
```

**CTA:** Book Now / Call Now

---

### Template 7: New Service/Product
```
🆕 Now offering: [New Service/Product]!

We're excited to announce that [Business Name] now provides [new service/product].

What's included:
• [Feature 1]
• [Feature 2]
• [Feature 3]

Why we added this: [Brief explanation of customer need]

[Introductory offer if applicable]

Be one of the first to try it!

#NewService #[City]Business #[Industry]News
```

**CTA:** Learn More / Call Now

---

## Offer Post Templates

### Template 1: Percentage Off
```
🎉 SPECIAL OFFER: [X]% OFF [Service]!

For a limited time, save [X]% on [service] at [Business Name]!

This includes:
✅ [What's included 1]
✅ [What's included 2]
✅ [What's included 3]

💰 Regular price: $[XXX]
💰 Your price: $[XXX]

⏰ Offer valid through [Date]

Don't miss out - call or click to claim your discount!

#SpecialOffer #[City]Deals #Save[X]Percent
```

**CTA:** Get Offer / Redeem Online

---

### Template 2: Dollar Amount Off
```
💵 SAVE $[XX] on [Service]!

Get $[XX] off any [service] when you book this week!

Perfect if you need:
• [Use case 1]
• [Use case 2]
• [Use case 3]

Just mention "GBP SPECIAL" when you call.

📞 [Phone number]
📍 Serving [City] and surrounding areas

Hurry - offer ends [Date]!

#[City]Savings #LocalDeals #[Industry]Special
```

**CTA:** Get Offer / Call Now

---

### Template 3: Free Add-On
```
🎁 FREE [Add-on] with any [Service]!

Book any [service] this month and receive a FREE [add-on] (a $[XX] value)!

Why we're doing this:
[Brief reason - celebrating anniversary, thanking customers, etc.]

This offer is available to the first [XX] customers, so don't wait!

👉 Click below or call [Phone] to schedule.

#FreeOffer #[City]Special #LimitedTime
```

**CTA:** Get Offer / Book Now

---

### Template 4: First-Time Customer
```
👋 New to [Business Name]?

We'd love to earn your business! Here's a special welcome offer:

🎉 [X]% OFF your first [service]

We've been proudly serving [City] for [X] years, and we'd love to show you why our customers keep coming back.

⭐ [X.X] stars from [XXX]+ reviews

Use code: WELCOME[X] or just mention this post.

📞 Call today: [Phone]

#NewCustomer #FirstTimeDiscount #[City]Welcome
```

**CTA:** Get Offer / Call Now

---

## Event Post Templates

### Template 1: Workshop/Class
```
📅 JOIN US: [Event Name]

Date: [Day, Date]
Time: [Start] - [End]
Location: [Address or "Virtual"]

Learn how to [what they'll learn] from our expert team!

What you'll get:
• [Benefit 1]
• [Benefit 2]
• [Takeaway/material included]

🎟️ Limited to [XX] spots
💰 [Price or "FREE"]

Don't miss this opportunity to [benefit]!

Register now 👇

#[City]Events #Free[Topic]Class #LocalWorkshop
```

**CTA:** Learn More / Sign Up / Register

---

### Template 2: Open House
```
🏠 You're Invited: Open House at [Business Name]!

📅 [Day, Date]
⏰ [Time range]
📍 [Address]

Come see our [facility/showroom/office] and meet the team!

What to expect:
🎈 [Activity 1]
🎁 [Giveaway/refreshments]
💰 [Special day-of offers]

Bring the family - all are welcome!

RSVP appreciated but not required.

#OpenHouse #[City]Events #MeetUs
```

**CTA:** Learn More / Get Directions

---

### Template 3: Community Event
```
🤝 See you at [Event Name]!

[Business Name] will be at [Event] this [Day]!

📍 [Location]
📅 [Date]
⏰ [Time]

Stop by our booth for:
• [What you're offering 1]
• [What you're offering 2]
• [Giveaway/freebie]

We love supporting our [City] community and can't wait to meet you!

#[City]Community #SupportLocal #[EventName]
```

**CTA:** Learn More / Get Directions

---

## Industry-Specific Examples

### Home Services (Plumber, HVAC, Electrician)
```
🔧 [Season] [Service] Season is here!

Is your [system/equipment] ready for [weather condition]? Don't get caught with [problem] when you need it most!

Our [Season] tune-up includes:
✅ [Service 1]
✅ [Service 2]
✅ [Service 3]

📞 Book now: [Phone]
💰 Only $[XX] (normally $[XX])

Serving [City], [City], and [City] for [X]+ years!

#[City]HVAC #[Season]Ready #HomeServices
```

---

### Healthcare/Dental
```
😁 When was your last [checkup/cleaning]?

The [Association] recommends [frequency], but we know life gets busy!

At [Practice Name], we make it easy:
✅ [Convenient hours/location]
✅ [Insurance/payment options]
✅ [Comfort amenity]

Now accepting new patients in [City]!

📞 Schedule today: [Phone]

Your [health type] matters to us.

#[City]Dentist #NewPatients #[Type]Health
```

---

### Restaurant/Food Service
```
🍽️ New on the menu: [Dish Name]!

[Brief, mouthwatering description]

Made with [key ingredients] and [preparation method].

Available now for:
🍴 Dine-in
🥡 Takeout
🚗 Delivery

📍 [Address]
📞 [Phone]
⏰ Open [hours]

Come taste what everyone's talking about!

#[City]Eats #NewMenuItem #[Cuisine]Food
```

---

### Retail/Shopping
```
✨ Just arrived: [Product/Collection]!

We're excited to introduce [product/collection] to our [City] store!

Perfect for:
• [Use case 1]
• [Use case 2]
• [Gift idea]

💰 Starting at $[XX]

Come see it in person:
📍 [Address]
⏰ [Store hours]

Or shop online: [Website]

#NewArrivals #[City]Shopping #[Product]
```

---

### Professional Services (Lawyer, Accountant, Consultant)
```
📊 [Timely topic] - What you need to know

[Brief explanation of current issue/deadline]

At [Business Name], we help [City] [clients] with:
✅ [Service 1]
✅ [Service 2]
✅ [Service 3]

Don't navigate [topic] alone. Schedule a free consultation today.

📞 [Phone]
🌐 [Website]

#[City]Lawyer #[Topic]Help #FreeConsultation
```

---

## Content Calendar Template

### Week 1
- **Monday:** Service highlight post
- **Thursday:** Customer review/success story

### Week 2
- **Tuesday:** Tip/educational content
- **Friday:** Behind the scenes/team spotlight

### Week 3
- **Monday:** Offer/promotion post
- **Thursday:** Seasonal/timely content

### Week 4
- **Tuesday:** New service/product highlight
- **Friday:** Community/engagement post

---

## Photo Guidelines

### Recommended Photo Types
- Team at work
- Finished projects
- Before/after
- Equipment/products
- Storefront/facility
- Team headshots
- Customer interactions (with permission)
- Community involvement

### Photo Specs
- **Minimum size:** 720x720px
- **Ideal size:** 1200x900px
- **Format:** JPG or PNG
- **File size:** Under 5MB
- **Aspect ratio:** 4:3 preferred

### Photo Tips
- Good lighting (natural when possible)
- High resolution
- No watermarks or heavy branding
- Show real work, not stock photos
- Geotag before uploading

---

## Hashtag Reference

### Location Tags
- #[City]Business
- #[City]Local
- #Serving[City]
- #[Neighborhood]
- #[State]SmallBusiness

### Industry Tags
- #[Industry]Services
- #[Industry]Experts
- #Local[Industry]
- #[Industry]Tips
- #[Industry]Pros

### Engagement Tags
- #SupportLocal
- #SmallBusiness
- #CustomerFirst
- #QualityService
- #TrustedPros
